steps.title: Write the sum
steps.content:
Add the two expressions exactly as given. The first expression has an $r^3$ term, an $r^2$ term, and a constant; the second has an $r^2$ term, an $r$ term, and a constant. Keep all terms visible:
$$
(r^3+6r^2+9)+(r^2+10r+14)
$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Only terms with the same power of $r$ can be combined:
$$
r^3+(6r^2+r^2)+10r+(9+14)
$$
$$
r^3+7r^2+10r+23
$$

steps.title: Match the expression
steps.content: The simplified expression is $r^3+7r^2+10r+23$. The answer is D.
